title: "Title TBD"
---

## Overview

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under Construction

## Learning Objectives

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

## Preparation

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

{{< include topics/promote-products.qmd >}}




{{< include topics/notebook-value.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/external_lter-workshop-quarto.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/make-website.qmd >}}
